project_name: CityTransit - Local Public Transport Live Tracking
theme_archetype: Electric & Neon (The Neon Night Rider) - High-Contrast Urban Utility

headings.weights: font-black for massive impact, font-medium for standard headers

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use 'Retro-Futurism' for admin tables and 'Glassmorphism (Crystal)' for passenger map overlays.
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid borders on everything to ground the neon (Neo-brutalism). No muddy shadows.
visual_enhancers.radius: Mix extremely sharp edges (rounded-none) for cards/containers with pill-shapes (rounded-full) for action buttons.

grids.admin_dashboard: High Density Grid (grid-cols-4). Strict hierarchy, compact spacing (gap-6).
grids.driver_portal: Mobile-first, single column. Massive touch targets (p-8).

layouts.passenger_app: Full-screen map background (Leaflet) with floating Glassmorphism panels at the bottom for vehicle lists. Search bar floats at top-center.
layouts.driver_app: Utilitarian. Massive numbers for 'Distance/Time'. The 'Go Live' button must be a full-width draggable slider or massive pill button, not a tiny toggle.
layouts.admin_app: Sidebar navigation. Dense metric cards at top (F-pattern), data tables occupying remainder of screen.

motion.live_indicator: Pulsing radar ring animation via framer-motion (scale 1 to 2, opacity 1 to 0) around the live tracking dot.
motion.page_transitions: Slide up and fade in for dashboards.
motion.hover_states: High contrast shifts (e.g., hover:bg-white hover:text-black on primary buttons).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over neon colors uses pure black (#000000) for contrast. Map overlays must have sufficient backdrop blur and dark background tint.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='go-live-slider').

image_urls.category: Hero Section Background / Admin Login Background
Passenger App - Feature Image / Vehicle Type Avatar

3d_libraries.map: react-leaflet with CartoDB Dark Matter tiles ('https://{s}.basemaps.cartocdn.com/dark_all/{z}/{x}/{y}{r}.png').
3d_libraries.animations: framer-motion for slider, toast, and live ping indicators.

instructions_to_main_agent.setup: Install font packages (e.g., @fontsource/outfit, @fontsource/ibm-plex-sans), framer-motion, react-leaflet, leaflet, lucide-react. Ensure Leaflet CSS is imported.
instructions_to_main_agent.execution: Do NOT use default Shadcn themes. Override the CSS variables in index.css to match the Deep Void Black and Rani Pink palette. Use JS/JSX, not TSX.
instructions_to_main_agent.design_rules: Strictly use the 'F-pattern' for the admin dashboard. Do NOT use generic transparent backgrounds for map overlays—use solid or heavy glassmorphism to ensure text legibility.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: transition: all. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add .App { text-align: center; } in the css file.
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like robot/brain/etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
DO NOT use complete transparent background in header, overlays, any surface that has content under it.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
